title: Add Topper Ignite logo image to navbar and footer

requirements.summary: Replace the existing logo in the Navbar component with the Topper Ignite logo image served from frontend/public/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.dim_256x256.png
acceptanceCriteria: The Topper Ignite logo image (TG circular fire design) is visible in the Navbar on desktop and mobile views.
The logo image is served from frontend/public/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.dim_256x256.png.
The logo in the Navbar links to or scrolls to the top of the page.
No broken image or missing asset errors appear in the browser console.

file_operations.description: Replace the existing logo element with an img tag that renders the Topper Ignite logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.dim_256x256.png. Ensure the logo maintains appropriate sizing (suggested: h-10 w-10 or similar for circular logo) and is wrapped in a clickable element that scrolls to the top of the page. Keep all existing navigation links, Subscribe CTA, and mobile menu functionality unchanged.

requirements.summary: Replace the existing brand logo in the Footer component with the same Topper Ignite logo image
acceptanceCriteria: The Topper Ignite logo image is visible in the Footer brand section.
The logo renders at an appropriate size consistent with the footer layout.

file_operations.description: Replace the existing brand logo element in the Footer with an img tag that renders the Topper Ignite logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/topper-ignite-logo.dim_256x256.png. Ensure the logo size is appropriate for the footer layout (suggested: h-12 w-12 or similar). Keep all existing social links, navigation buttons, topics list, and copyright text unchanged.
